apology.title: I'm Sorry
apology.subtitle: A sincere message to my friends

section1.title: Why I Made This
section1.content: I wanted to create a space to genuinely express my feelings, share what I've learned, and give you the opportunity to set boundaries that matter to you. This isn't about seeking forgiveness easily—it's about accountability and rebuilding trust.

section2.title: What Happened
section2.content: At the picnic, I wasn't fully present. I was caught in my own thoughts and didn't recognize how my actions and words affected each of you. I took your patience for granted.

section3.title: Why It Mattered
section3.content: You all matter to me. Your feelings, your time, and your trust are not things I should handle carelessly. The impact of that day showed me that I need to be more intentional and present in the moments I share with people I care about.

section4.title: What I've Learned
section4.content: I've realized that friendship isn't about grand gestures—it's about showing up consistently, listening genuinely, and respecting boundaries. I'm committed to being better.

section5.title: My Apology
section5.content: I'm genuinely sorry for letting you down. I apologize for not being fully present and for the hurt I caused. I want to work on rebuilding what might have been damaged and earn back the trust I know I need to rebuild.

apology.thankyou: Thank you for taking the time to read my apology. Your understanding means a lot to me.
apology.callToAction: Now, you can set boundaries and share what matters to you.
